tools.name: get_instrument
tools.description: Get Martingale score and detailed analysis for a specific crypto, stock, or commodity. Returns score breakdown, parameters, and exchange availability.

tools.name: search_instruments
tools.description: Search and filter instruments by Martingale score, Startingale, exchange, and other criteria. Returns a ranked list of matching instruments.

tools.name: list_top_crypto
tools.description: Get the top-rated cryptocurrencies by Martingale score. Optionally filter by minimum Startingale.

tools.name: list_top_stocks
tools.description: Get the top-rated stocks by Martingale score. Optionally filter by minimum Startingale.

tools.name: market_overview
tools.description: Get a comprehensive overview of current market conditions across crypto and stocks. Shows top 5-10 instruments ranked by Martingale Score (0-5), with their Startingale readings.

tools.name: crypto_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of the cryptocurrency market. Shows top 5 cryptos ranked by Martingale Score (0-5), with their current Startingale readings.

tools.name: stock_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of the stock market. Shows top 5 stocks ranked by Martingale Score (0-5), with their current Startingale readings.
